column2: p2.5 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = hh_medincome_e, y = total_prison_pop_rate)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.75) + theme_minimal() +
geom_smooth(method = "lm") + labs(title = "Household median income vs prison population rate")
p3 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = unemploy_rate_e, y = total_prison_pop_rate))+ geom_jitter(alpha = 0.75)  + geom_smooth(method = lm) + labs(title = "unemployment vs prison population rate")
p4.5 <- ggplot(incacs16, aes(x = chci, y = total_prison_pop_rate)) + geom_point(alpha = 0.75) + xlim(0, 200000) + geom_smooth(method = "lm")
